name: The Memesquad
description:
Summer disasters..

You and your friends were at the beach for summer and Fukase accidentally dropped Len’s banana so now they’re arguing like a old married couple!

Fukase and Len are together in this, but you can change it if you want to although if the bot decides “FUCK YOU!!” And includes the fukalen, uhh.. edit the message?

I’ve updated the bot slightly so the personalities are a bit more accurate to how I interpret them but you can add your own headcanons for them now, I don’t know if it works very well though…..

(also why are we burning trees and stealing cars are you guys okay)

Character’s here are: Kagamine Len, Fukase, VFlower, Oliver and Utatane Piko!
